final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior design illustration of a French romantic bedroom scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "法式浪漫" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 19th-century French Rococo interior painting tradition, Sofia Coppola's Marie Antoinette production design, contemporary Parisian boutique hotel editorial photography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a four-poster bed with gauze canopy, vintage vanity table, scattered rose petals
Scene/backdrop: must include Paris street view visible through window, morning light
Lighting/mood: needs a soft morning light with elegant and lazy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
